raw_text:

{
  "claims": [
    "Research has shown that placement tests alone do not accurately predict a student’s ability to succeed in college level courses.",
    "Placement tests disproportionately place Latino and African American students into unnecessary remedial courses.",
    "Remedial courses force students to spend unnecessary time and money without actually progressing towards a credential or transferring to further education.",
